# Rythma

> Know your hard days before they hit — the period and symptom tracker built specifically for the unpredictability of perimenopause.

Rythma is an iPhone app that learns each user's personal symptom patterns and predicts difficult days before they arrive. Unlike general period trackers that assume a regular ~28-day cycle, Rythma is designed for the irregularity of perimenopause: it helps women in their 40s and 50s understand their changing bodies, anticipate high-symptom days, plan their lives around them, and bring a clear symptom report to their doctor.

## Key Resources

- [Blog](https://rythma.co/blog): Clear, well-sourced articles on perimenopause symptoms, patterns, and how to track them.
- [Rythma](https://rythma.co): The product website.
- [Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/rythma-perimenopause-tracker/id6762185611): Get the Rythma app for iPhone.

## Content Focus

The blog covers:
- Perimenopause symptoms and patterns (hot flashes, sleep, mood, brain fog, irregular cycles)
- Cycle and symptom tracking in midlife (and why standard period apps fall short)
- Managing daily life and relationships through perimenopause

## Authorship

Content is written by The Rythma Team and sourced from primary and clinical authorities (e.g. NICE, ACOG, The Menopause Society, NHS, and peer-reviewed research).

## Disclaimer

Rythma is a tracking and educational tool, not a medical device. Blog content is for general information only and is not medical advice. Perimenopause varies from person to person; readers should consult a qualified healthcare professional about their symptoms, diagnosis, or treatment.
